text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the autumn Tenno<n>Sho, where
the showdown of the "top<n>three" will take place.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the lead-up to the race, the<n>members of BNW
spend their time<n>together like always.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But the racecourse is where they'll<n>share their
thoughts and feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin heads to the track with<n>a fire burning
quietly within her.
